text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p:
Three modes via field presence:
 routePath/externalUrl ⇒ leaf
 children ⇒ sub-tree
 sections ⇒ mega-menu

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p: Discriminated by kind.\nExternal link/router-link/action handler\nall flow through one renderer.
